data.title: UTulsa and Hurricane Ventures invest in Tobe Energy, an electrolysis startup by alumni, to boost innovation.
data.description: A recent announcement from the University of Tulsa and Hurricane Ventures in Tulsa, Oklahoma on December 26, 2025, revealed an investment in Tobe Energy. This startup focused on electrolysis was co-founded by University of Tulsa alumni Colby DeWeese and Caleb Lareau. The investment is aimed at fast-tracking Tobe Energy's objectives and further developing their innovative electrolysis technology.

data.title: Law firm investigating CoreWeave, Inc. (NASDAQ: CRWV) for potential securities law violations, urges investors with significant losses to contact them. Dec. 26, 2025.
data.description: A legal investigation is ongoing by the law firm Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check, LLP in Radnor, Pennsylvania as of December 26, 2025. The firm is looking into potential breaches of federal securities laws concerning investors of CoreWeave, Inc. (NASDAQ: CRWV). CoreWeave's operations are under scrutiny in relation to this case.

data.title: IoT MVNO market valued at $2.7B in 2024, projected to reach $6.5B by 2030 with 15.7% CAGR growth. Trend driven by smart cities and connected utilities.
data.description: Dublin – A recent report on the IoT Mobile Virtual Network Operators (MVNO) Market has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com’s offerings. The global market for IoT MVNO was estimated to be worth US$2.7 billion in 2024 and is anticipated to grow to US$6.5 billion by 2030. This represents a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 15.7% from 2024 to 2030. The report offers a detailed analysis of market trends, drivers, and projections to assist businesses in making informed decisions.

data.title: Strategist Tei introduces Human-Centered Leadership Framework after Tamron Hall Show appearance; gains rising national profile.
data.description: On Dec. 26, 2025, in New York, Tei, a leadership strategist also known as Tei "No Resource Untapped," unveiled her Human-Centered Leadership Framework after appearing on The Tamron Hall Show with Kimora Lee Simmons. This framework aims to revolutionize leadership approaches by placing human interactions at the forefront of decision-making processes. This announcement comes after Tei's appearance on the show where she discussed the importance of prioritizing people in leadership strategies.

data.title: Investors of SLM Corporation between July 25 and August 14, 2025, facing losses urged to contact Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP.
data.description: James (Josh) Wilson, a Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is calling out to investors who have incurred losses in SLM. If you bought or obtained securities in SLM within the period of July 25, 2025, to August 14, 2025, and wish to explore your options, Wilson urges you to reach out to him directly.

data.title: Italian regulators order Meta to keep WhatsApp open for rival AI chatbots, prompting OpenAI and Microsoft to remove AI assistants.
data.description: Following a policy shift by Meta, OpenAI and Microsoft decided to withdraw AI assistants from WhatsApp. The Italian regulators have instructed Meta to maintain WhatsApp accessible for competitor AI chatbots. This development was reported by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Stock futures slipped on Christmas Eve despite strong Q3 GDP growth at 4.3%. Dow -0.07%, S&P 500 -0.06%, Nasdaq 100 -0.05%. UiPath shares rose 7.14% after joining S&P Midcap 400. Fed likely to keep rates unchanged with 86.7% probability. Bond yields: 10-year Treasury 4.16%, two-year bond 3.53%. Markets close early at 1:00 p.m. ET on Christmas Eve and remain shut on Thursday.
data.description: U.S. stock futures declined post Tuesday's higher close, with major benchmark indices also falling ahead of an early market closure for Christmas Eve. The S&P 500 index hit a new record after GDP growth outperformed expectations at 4.3% annualized in Q3, its fastest rate in two years. 10-year Treasury bond yielded 4.16%, two-year bond at 3.53%, and markets predict an 86.7% chance of Fed maintaining current interest rates. Pre-market, SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (SPY) was up 0.004% at $687.99, while Invesco QQQ Trust ETF (QQQ) rose 0.013% to $622.19. UiPath Inc. (PATH) shares surged by 7.14% following its addition to the S&P MidCap 400. Find more details on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Meta Platforms, Inc. stock slightly up; $500 monthly from dividends, yielding 0.32%, $2.10/year per share.
data.description: Shares of Meta Platforms, Inc. closed slightly higher in Tuesday's session. Baird analyst Colin Sebastian reaffirmed an Outperform rating on Meta and decreased the price target from $820 to $815. The company currently offers an annual dividend yield of 0.32%, equivalent to a quarterly dividend of 52.5 cents per share ($2.10 annually). With the interest in Meta growing, investors are considering potential gains from dividends. To receive a consistent $500 monthly income solely from dividends, one would need to have a significant... Find more details on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Snowflake in talks to acquire startup Observe amidst AI buying spree. Adds to multiple acquisitions in artificial intelligence sector.
data.description: Snowflake is reportedly in discussions to acquire Observe, a startup, as part of its ongoing spree of purchasing artificial intelligence companies. This potential deal highlights Snowflake's strategy to expand its AI capabilities. The acquisition of Observe would contribute to Snowflake's growing portfolio of AI technologies. This move comes amidst a series of acquisitions by Snowflake in the AI sector. The speculated acquisition demonstrates Snowflake's commitment to enhancing its AI offerings.

data.title: PharmAla Biotech Holdings Inc. releases financial results for Year End 2025 and Q1 2026, with customer deposits growing: $276k in 2025 and $433k in Q1 2026. Phase 2a/b clinical trial in Australia planned for 2026.
data.description: PharmAla Biotech Holdings Inc., a biotechnology company, has released its financial results for the periods ending August 31, 2025, and November 30, 2025. The company's Audited Financial Statements for the 2025 fiscal year and unaudited financial statements for the first quarter of fiscal 2026 are accessible on its website. CEO Nick Kadysh mentioned progress in developing novel molecules and plans for a Phase 2a/b clinical trial in Australia. Additionally, there is a growing demand for LaNeo™ MDMA, with customer deposits showing consistent growth. Financially, customer deposits increased by $150k at year-end 2025 and by $225k in Q1 2026, offset by recognized revenue. Reimbursement approval for medical treatments with LaNeo MDMA in Australia has also contributed to this positive trend.

data.title: Microsoft optimistic for 2026 growth with AI investments, combating skepticism, backed by analyst reports.
data.description: This week, Microsoft has received positive analyst reports amid skepticism over its AI investments. Analysts have projected that Microsoft will showcase significant growth fueled by AI by 2026, aiming to prove skeptics wrong.

data.title: Sanofi acquires Dynavax for $2.2B, $15.50 per share, boosting adult immunizations. Dynavax stock surges.
data.description: A significant acquisition was announced as Sanofi revealed its plan to purchase vaccine manufacturer Dynavax Technologies for $2.2 billion, which amounts to $15.50 per share. This acquisition is intended to bolster Sanofi's portfolio in the field of adult immunizations. Following this news, Dynavax Technologies' stock surged.

data.title: Costco's quality ranking surged to 94.90 from 86.58 in Q1 report, exceeding revenue estimates with $67.31 billion.
data.description: Costco Wholesale Corp. (NASDAQ: COST) achieved a notable increase in its quality score from 86.58 to 94.90 in Benzinga Edge's Stock Rankings. This surge propelled the retailer into the top 10th percentile of stocks for fundamental strength. Following a successful fiscal first-quarter report, where it surpassed earnings and revenue expectations, Costco has demonstrated impressive operational efficiency and financial health. In this quarterly report, Costco reported revenues of $67.31 billion, exceeding analyst forecasts of $67.14 billion. Additionally, its adjusted earnings per share stood at $4.50, surpassing the expected $4.27. The significant rise in Costco's quality ranking can be directly attributed to its strong first-quarter performance, marking a robust performance milestone for the company. For more details, the full story can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: AI hardware market to grow from $31.40B in 2025 to $624.4B in 2035, with CAGR of 31.23%. Demand for processing capabilities driving growth.
data.description: Dublin - A report titled "AI Hardware Market Till 2035: Industry Trends and Global Forecasts" has recently been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. According to the report, the global AI hardware market is expected to experience remarkable growth, with an increase from USD 31.40 billion in the present year to an estimated USD 624.4 billion by 2035. This growth represents a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 31.23%. The surge in the AI hardware market is attributed to the rising need for enhanced processing capabilities to accommodate complex AI workloads and computational operations.

data.title: Dreame Technology donates 60 air purifiers to Save the Children for improved respiratory health.
data.description: In Fresno, California on December 26, 2025, Dreame Technology, a prominent company in high-end consumer electronics and intelligent manufacturing, displayed holiday generosity by generously donating 60 air purifiers to Save the Children. This charitable act was intended to enhance children's respiratory health and well-being during the festive season.
